metadata.description: NotebookLM access for Claude Code, positioned in the Galaxia stack: media and large-corpus analysis, with gbrain as the retrieval memory.

plugins.name: notebooklm-galaxia
plugins.description: Full programmatic access to Google NotebookLM: create notebooks, add sources, query a corpus, and generate every artifact (podcast, video, slides, quiz, infographic, mind map, report). Includes a gbrain-first session wrapup.
